name: part_009
file: tmp_【重大告知あり】新３Dお披露目？！癒月ちょこ生誕祭2026🎂 【ホロライブ⧸癒月ちょこ】 [_1PGuuEP7ps]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_009.webm

scenes.description: Yuzuki Choco and Shigure Ui perform 'Daisuki! (だーいしゅき！)' by HoneyWorks.
Crowd cheering and transition. Yuzuki Choco changes into her 3D outfit behind a curtain.
Yuzuki Choco and Shiranui Flare perform 'Sekai wa Koi ni Ochiteiru (世界は恋に落ちている)' by HoneyWorks.

subtitles.original: 目に見るだけでいい
